title: PR-2 full-day autonomous jobs and GameSession integration
summary: Integrate eight residents, needs, shifts, capabilities and reusable eating/rest/hauling/lamp/treatment drivers into the authoritative GameSession for one deterministic full day.
acceptance: The authoritative pr2-autonomous-town-life scenario composes at least a 64x64 navigable map, exactly eight default residents, five need lanes, staggered work/rest shifts, versioned capabilities, food/wood/stone/lamp-oil/medical stock, storage, eight bed slots, lamp targets and a treatment interaction in one GameSession

Without player assignment or repeated commands, all eight residents perform at least one non-idle autonomous transition during one 36000-tick day and a deterministic checkpoint has at least three residents concurrently executing three different work kinds among eat, rest/sleep, haul, lamp patrol/refill and treatment

WM-0170 arbitration drives existing indexed food/rest/medical/storage/lamp/WorkOffer surfaces and explicit JobCore drivers; the PR-1 one-resident minimum GameSessionJobLifecycle is retired from the default scenario and remains regression-only

Authoritative LocationStore movement follows a versioned bounded route and crosses more than four tiles over multiple ticks; moving and working each naturally persist for at least two coherent 1x publication boundaries without UI delays or renderer-owned progress

Idle, claiming, moving, working, blocked, completed, failed and interrupted are exercised or deterministically probeable with state/job/route/reason snapshot round trips; terminal and interruption paths release reservations, carried state and route ownership exactly once

Two fixed-seed 36000-tick runs have matching checkpoint world/read-model hashes and transition/reason counts; a 100000-tick run ends with zero active terminal jobs/reservations, path/command/dirty backlog and resource conservation delta, with structured first-divergence evidence

Decision/path caps and no-allocation hot paths satisfy the architecture budgets: no more than 24 visited/12 retained/4 exact paths, two new decisions per tick, tick P95 <=4ms and P99 <=8ms on the recorded reference host
No protocol/schema/projection, Worker/Web/Pixi/HUD, save/load, public compatibility, dependency, PR-3 command or release change is made

history.details: Scoped the eight-resident 36000-tick authoritative GameSession integration after WM-0170; remains proposed and unclaimed.

saveLoadStance: Active resident/job/route state must be explicit and snapshot-testable, but GameSession save/load stays unsupported and no format or public compatibility is introduced.
forbiddenPaths: modifying WM-0170-owned game-session-autonomy*.ts contracts except through a separately reviewed repair task
modifying generic M2/M3 owner stores and historical scenario runners instead of composing their existing public surfaces
packages/sim-protocol/**, packages/sim-worker/**, apps/**, packages/renderer-pixi/** or packages/ui-react/**
wall-clock access in sim-core, global scans, unbounded routes/candidates, client authority or artificial visible-state delay
speed-contract migration reserved for WM-0172, save/load implementation, runtime dependency, PR-3 commands or release action
executionLane: simulation-engineer; Spark is prohibited because this task integrates deterministic owner stores, jobs, reservations, pathing and long-run invariants
singleWriterRule: WM-0171 starts only after WM-0170 is independently verified, integrated and done. WM-0172..WM-0175 remain proposed and unclaimed until their direct predecessors close.
